name: Denny Zeitlin
abstract: Denny Zeitlin (born April 10, 1938) is an American jazz pianist, composer, and clinical professor of psychiatry at University of California, San Francisco. Since 1963, he has recorded more than 100 compositions and was a first-place winner in the DownBeat International Jazz Critics' Poll in 1965 and 1974.

interviews.title: Denny Zeitlin interviewed by Monk Rowe, San Francisco, California, August 8, 2002

about_quotes.speaker: Marian McPartland
about_quotes.evidence: Denny Zeitlin. God, that man has such fantastic chops. That was another one where I felt like a wave had washed over me.
about_quotes.doc_title: Marian McPartland — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Liebman
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] San Francisco is great if you’re Denny Zeitlin.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Liebman — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
